response:
emulate the delete confirmation page behavior before saving certain models in the admin  
in my case if I change one object, certain others should be deleted as they depend upon the object's now out-of-date state  

the key challenge is to implement a mechanism that prompts the user for confirmation before proceeding with cascading deletions  
this requires a way to detect dependencies and trigger a confirmation dialog when changes are made to an object
